summary.lv: Moneliq Europe (fintech) meklē Java izstrādātāju backend servisu izstrādei ar Java un Spring Boot mikroservisu arhitektūrā — PostgreSQL, Kafka/RabbitMQ, Docker un Kubernetes; hibrīda darbs.
summary.en: Moneliq Europe, a fintech, is hiring a Java Developer to build backend services with Java and Spring Boot in a microservices architecture — PostgreSQL, Kafka/RabbitMQ, Docker and Kubernetes; hybrid work model.
